calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Yvonne Lee.
Jeff Margulies, Esq., for Plaintiff Joel Coopersmith trustees of the Revocable Trust, represented by Kari Kobil; Asst. Manager.
Defendant, Ron McGuire present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation (not filed in court).
Essential terms read into the record.
Defendants agreed to vacate on or before 5 p.m. Feb. 3, 2004.
Plaintiff to waived rent.
If not complied, Judgment for $6,850.00.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

Notice Of Motion To Strike To Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RON MCGUIRE, SUSAN COLEMAN Notice Of Motion To Strike To Complaint: Off calendar as moot. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RON MCGUIRE, SUSAN COLEMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
